name: pr_updater_deterministic
description: Deterministic PR updater — no LLM. Reads contextbook, pushes, creates/updates PR.

inputParameters.command: git add -A -- ':!.contextbook' && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'fix: address review feedback') && (git push origin HEAD 2>&1 || git push --set-upstream origin $(git branch --show-current) 2>&1)
gh pr view --repo ${workflow.input.repo} --json number,url 2>/dev/null || echo NO_PR

inputParameters.expression: function e() { var raw = $.check_result || ''; if (raw.indexOf('NO_PR') >= 0) return { exists: false, number: 0, url: '' }; try { var parsed = JSON.parse(raw.replace(/^\[exit \d+\]\n?/, '')); return { exists: true, number: parsed.number || 0, url: parsed.url || '' }; } catch(e) { return { exists: false, number: 0, url: '' }; } } e();
function e() { var text = $.issue_pr || ''; var m = text.match(/# Issue #(\d+)/); return { issue_number: m ? m[1] : '0' }; } e();

function e() { var n = $.issue_num; var impl = $.impl || '(none)'; var qa = $.qa || '(none)'; var issue = $.issue || '(none)'; var design = $.design || '(none)'; var conv = $.conv || '(none)'; var branch = ($.branch || '').replace(/^\[exit \d+\]
?/, '').trim(); var repo = $.repo; var body = 'Fixes #' + n + '

'; body += '## Summary
' + impl.split('
').slice(0, 20).join('
') + '

'; body += '## Testing
' + qa.split('
').slice(0, 20).join('
') + '

'; body += '<details><summary>contextbook: issue_pr</summary>

' + issue + '

</details>

'; body += '<details><summary>contextbook: architecture_design_test</summary>

' + design + '

</details>

'; body += '<details><summary>contextbook: implementation</summary>

' + impl + '

</details>

'; body += '<details><summary>contextbook: qa_testing</summary>

' + qa + '

</details>

'; body += '<details><summary>contextbook: repo_conventions</summary>

' + conv + '

</details>

'; body += '<details><summary>context.json</summary>

```json
{"repo": "' + repo + '", "branch": "' + branch + '", "agents": ["issue_pr_fetcher", "tech_lead", "coder", "qa_agent", "pr_updater"]}
```

</details>'; return { body: body, title: 'fix: issue #' + n, branch: branch }; } e();

function e() { if ($.existing_url) return { url: $.existing_url }; var out = $.create_result || ''; var m = out.match(/https:\/\/github\.com\/[^\s]+\/pull\/\d+/); return { url: m ? m[0] : 'https://github.com/' + $.repo + '/pull/unknown' }; } e();
